goal: Move the central scaffold implementation behind the factory namespace while preserving top-level imports through a compatibility wrapper.
constraints: Preserve existing import paths for callers and tests
Keep scaffold verification import-only to avoid creating extra chip directories in this tranche
behavioral_changes: The real scaffold implementation now lives under chip_labs.chip_factory.
The old top-level scaffold module now acts as a compatibility wrapper.
Loop-controller factory imports now go through the factory namespace more consistently.
verification_targets: PYTHONPATH=src python -c "from chip_labs.scaffold import scaffold_chip, load_brief, validate_brief; from chip_labs.chip_factory.scaffold import scaffold_chip as moved_scaffold_chip; import chip_labs.cli, chip_labs.loop_controller; print('scaffold-move-imports-ok')"
follow_up: If the factory surface continues moving, methodology.py and graduation.py are the next likely candidates.
Keep compatibility wrappers until the whole factory surface is fully settled behind the namespace.
